project.name: supernode
project.note: Multi-repo project. lumera provides chain types/protos. supernode (this) consumes them for metrics reporting and state handling.

feature_status.name: STORAGE_FULL State in SDK Adapter
feature_status.notes: SUPERNODE_STATE_STORAGE_FULL added to types.go and ParseSupernodeState updated. Uncommitted. Test file exists (untracked).

feature_status.name: Cascade Kademlia DB Bytes Metric
feature_status.notes: collectMetrics now reads statusResp.P2PMetrics.Database.P2PDbSizeMb and converts to bytes. Nil-safe check. Uncommitted.

feature_status.name: Verifier STORAGE_FULL Allowance
feature_status.notes: checkSupernodeState allows STORAGE_FULL with warning (alongside POSTPONED). Uncommitted. Test file exists (untracked).

feature_status.name: Lumera Proto Dependency Update
feature_status.notes: go.mod has local replace directive: github.com/LumeraProtocol/lumera => ../lumera. Needs tagged version before merge.

handoff.stopped_at: SN-1 Everlight basics — all 4 features have uncommitted changes. Tests written (types_test.go, verifier_test.go) but untracked and not yet run.
handoff.next_immediate: Run tests (AT01, AT03). Commit all changes. Rebase feature branch onto master (3 hotfix commits behind). Rename branch. Run gate.
watch_out: go.mod has local replace directive for lumera — will break CI. Need tagged lumera version.
Branch is named feature/S20-everlight-supernode — should be feature/SN-1-everlight-supernode.
Master is 3 commits ahead (hotfixes: disabled SDK complaint + storage challenge evidence). Rebase needed.

next_slice.goal: SuperNode recognizes STORAGE_FULL state, reports cascade_kademlia_db_bytes, allows STORAGE_FULL startup

recent_decisions: 2026-04-06: Everlight supernode slice is SN-1 (not S20). Supernode uses its own ID namespace.
2026-04-06: cascade_kademlia_db_bytes derived from P2P DB size in MB * 1024 * 1024.
2026-04-06: STORAGE_FULL treated same as POSTPONED in verifier — warning, not error.
2026-04-06: Local replace directive for lumera dep during active Everlight development.

discrepancies.description: Branch is feature/S20-everlight-supernode but slice ID is SN-1. Should be feature/SN-1-everlight-supernode.
discrepancies.proposed_fix: Rename branch after committing current changes.
